---
title: "warden_latency.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/benchmarks/warden_latency.py"
loc: 53
complexity: 5
logic_score: 6.60
style_score: 3.76
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.17
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating run_benchmark. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.atomic_gpt](file://src.core.engine.atomic_gpt)

### Exports
- `run_benchmark`
